query: SELECT appId, name, description, version, dataSource, dataSourceConfig, published, icon, creatorId FROM customApps;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3HixaTvZ1BE3FFg.root --database cJLhozXEame73NuZqMLXuR --execute SELECT appId, name, description, version, dataSource, dataSourceConfig, published, icon, creatorId FROM customApps;

rows.name: Test Sensor App
rows.description: Displays temperature and humidity sensor data

rows.name: All Widgets Test App
rows.description: Comprehensive test app demonstrating all 8 widget types including Text Display, Gauge, LED Indicator, Line Chart, Bar Chart, Map (GPS), Video Player, and Canvas renderer

rows.name: RPLidar Point Cloud Viewer
rows.description: Live RPLidar point cloud visualization via UI Builder canvas widget. Taps into the existing RPLidar data stream.

rows.name: LiDAR Stats Monitor
rows.description: Real-time LiDAR scan statistics dashboard - subscribes to the RPLidar point cloud stream

lidar-stats-monitor	LiDAR Stats Monitor	Real-time LiDAR scan statistics dashboard - subscribes to the RPLidar point cloud stream	1.0.0	stream_subscription	{"streamId":"pointcloud","streamEvent":"pointcloud","subscribeEvent":"subscribe","subscribeParam":"drone_id","fieldMappings":{"drone_id":"drone_id","timestamp":"timestamp","points":"points","point_count":"stats.point_count","valid_points":"stats.valid_points","avg_distance":"stats.avg_distance","avg_quality":"stats.avg_quality","min_distance":"stats.min_distance","max_distance":"stats.max_distance"}}	published	NULL	1
test5	test5	multi test	1.0.0	stream_subscription	{"streams":[{"streamId":"pointcloud","streamEvent":"pointcloud","subscribeEvent":"subscribe","subscribeParam":"drone_id","selectedFields":["drone_id","timestamp","stats.avg_distance"],"fieldAliases":{}},{"streamId":"camera_status","streamEvent":"camera_status","subscribeEvent":"subscribe_camera","subscribeParam":"drone_id","selectedFields":["connected"],"fieldAliases":{}},{"streamId":"telemetry","streamEvent":"telemetry","subscribeEvent":"subscribe","subscribeParam":"drone_id","selectedFields":["telemetry.battery_fc.voltage_v","telemetry.battery_fc.remaining_percent","telemetry.in_air","telemetry.position.relative_altitude_m"],"fieldAliases":{}}],"fieldMappings":{"drone_id":"pointcloud:drone_id","timestamp":"pointcloud:timestamp","avg_distance":"pointcloud:stats.avg_distance","connected":"camera_status:connected","voltage_v":"telemetry:telemetry.battery_fc.voltage_v","remaining_percent":"telemetry:telemetry.battery_fc.remaining_percent","in_air":"telemetry:telemetry.in_air","relative_altitude_m":"telemetry:telemetry.position.relative_altitude_m"}}	published	NULL	1
